title: croton glandulosus var. divaricatus
intro: Croton glandulosus var. divaricatus, commonly known as a variety of the Croton glandulosus plant, is a species of flowering plant in the spurge family, native to tropical and subtropical regions. The medicinal properties of Croton glandulosus var. divaricatus include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits of this plant include reducing inflammation, treating skin conditions, and alleviating symptoms of fever and rheumatism. Traditionally, Croton glandulosus var. divaricatus is prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal use, and it can also be used to make herbal teas, tinctures, and ointments.
